milestone.en: 1,121-qubit Condor (2024), Heron r2 (156q, 2024), Quantum System Two
milestone.zh: 1,121 量子位元 Condor (2024)、Heron r2 (156q, 2024)、Quantum System Two

desc.en: Pioneer in superconducting transmon qubits. Operates Qiskit software stack and IBM Quantum Network cloud platform.
desc.zh: 超導 transmon 量子位元的開創者。經營 Qiskit 軟體堆疊與 IBM Quantum Network 雲端平台。

milestone.en: Willow chip (105q, 2024) — below-threshold error correction demonstrated
milestone.zh: Willow 晶片 (105q, 2024) — 展示低於閾值錯誤更正

desc.en: Superconducting qubit research with focus on quantum error correction and supremacy benchmarks. Cirq software stack.
desc.zh: 聚焦量子錯誤更正與量子優越性基準的超導量子位元研究。使用 Cirq 軟體堆疊。

milestone.en: Ankaa-3 (84q, 2024), modular multi-chip architecture
milestone.zh: Ankaa-3 (84q, 2024)、模組化多晶片架構

desc.en: Public quantum cloud (RIGETTI on NASDAQ). Forest SDK, owns its own fabrication fab.
desc.zh: 上市量子雲端公司 (NASDAQ: RGTI)。Forest SDK，擁有自有晶圓廠。

milestone.en: IQM Radiance (54q, 2024), on-premise quantum systems for HPC centers
milestone.zh: IQM Radiance (54q, 2024)、為 HPC 中心提供 on-premise 量子系統

desc.en: Europe's leading superconducting vendor. Specializes in delivering on-premise quantum computers to research labs and supercomputing centers.
desc.zh: 歐洲領先的超導廠商。專注於交付 on-premise 量子電腦給研究實驗室與超算中心。

milestone.en: Toshiko (32q, 2023), Coaxmon proprietary 3D architecture
milestone.zh: Toshiko (32q, 2023)、Coaxmon 自有 3D 架構

desc.en: UK-based superconducting vendor with patented 3D Coaxmon qubit design. Available via Equinix data centers.
desc.zh: 英國超導廠商，擁有 3D Coaxmon 量子位元專利設計。透過 Equinix 資料中心提供服務。

milestone.en: Forte Enterprise (36 algorithmic qubits, 2024), barium ion roadmap
milestone.zh: Forte Enterprise (36 algorithmic qubits, 2024)、鋇離子路線圖

desc.en: First publicly traded pure-play quantum company (NYSE: IONQ). Trapped ytterbium/barium ion architecture available on AWS Braket, Azure Quantum, GCP.
desc.zh: 首家上市的純量子公司 (NYSE: IONQ)。鐿/鋇離子阱架構，可透過 AWS Braket、Azure Quantum、GCP 使用。

milestone.en: H2-1 (56q, QV 2^21, 2024), highest published quantum volume
milestone.zh: H2-1 (56q, QV 2^21, 2024)、業界最高公開 quantum volume

desc.en: Merger of Honeywell Quantum Solutions and Cambridge Quantum. Industry-leading fidelity. TKET SDK + InQuanto chemistry. (Parent Honeywell: NYSE HON.)
desc.zh: Honeywell Quantum Solutions 與 Cambridge Quantum 合併公司。業界領先保真度。TKET SDK + InQuanto 化學模擬。（母公司 Honeywell：NYSE HON。）

milestone.en: Electronic Qubit Control trap chips, 99.9992% 1Q gate fidelity (2024)
milestone.zh: 電子式量子位元控制晶片、99.9992% 單量子位元閘保真度 (2024)

desc.en: Trapped-ion qubits controlled by integrated electronics on silicon — no lasers for control. Acquired by IonQ (announced 2025).
desc.zh: 在矽晶片上以整合電子元件控制離子阱量子位元——控制不需雷射。IonQ 已宣布收購 (2025)。

milestone.en: PINE 24q rack-mount system, calcium ion technology spun out of Innsbruck
milestone.zh: PINE 24q 機架式系統、源於 Innsbruck 大學的鈣離子技術

desc.en: Spin-off from University of Innsbruck (Blatt group). 19-inch rack-mountable ion trap computers.
desc.zh: 源自 Innsbruck 大學 Blatt 組的衍生公司。19 吋機架可安裝的離子阱電腦。

milestone.en: 1M-qubit fault-tolerant system roadmap, Brisbane & Chicago utility-scale sites announced (2024)
milestone.zh: 百萬量子位元容錯系統路線圖、Brisbane 與 Chicago 規模化站址宣布 (2024)

desc.en: Most-funded private quantum company (>$1.5B). Targets fault-tolerant million-qubit photonic system using GlobalFoundries silicon photonics fab.
desc.zh: 募資最多的私人量子公司 (>$15 億美元)。目標利用 GlobalFoundries 矽光子廠房打造容錯百萬量子位元光子系統。

milestone.en: Borealis (216 squeezed-mode quantum advantage, 2022), Aurora networked photonic system (2024)
milestone.zh: Borealis (216 squeezed-mode 量子優勢, 2022)、Aurora 網路化光子系統 (2024)

desc.en: Continuous-variable photonic quantum computing. PennyLane open-source ML framework. Cloud access via Xanadu Cloud.
desc.zh: 連續變數光子量子運算。PennyLane 開源 ML 框架。透過 Xanadu Cloud 提供存取。

milestone.en: PT-1 room-temperature photonic systems deployed at UK MOD and PSNC (2024)
milestone.zh: PT-1 室溫光子系統部署於英國國防部與 PSNC (2024)

desc.en: Room-temperature photonic systems using quantum memories. Targets near-term ML and optimization applications.
desc.zh: 使用量子記憶體的室溫光子系統。針對近期 ML 與最佳化應用。

milestone.en: Aquila (256-atom, 2022), 48-logical-qubit error-corrected demo (Harvard collab, 2023)
milestone.zh: Aquila (256 原子, 2022)、48 邏輯量子位元錯誤更正展示 (與 Harvard 合作, 2023)

desc.en: Neutral-atom analog/digital systems. Available on AWS Braket. Spin-out from Harvard/MIT (Lukin/Vuletic groups).
desc.zh: 中性原子類比/數位系統。可透過 AWS Braket 使用。Harvard/MIT (Lukin/Vuletic 組) 衍生公司。

milestone.en: 1,225-site neutral atom array (2023), partnered with Microsoft on logical qubits (2024)
milestone.zh: 1,225 site 中性原子陣列 (2023)、與 Microsoft 合作邏輯量子位元 (2024)

desc.en: Strontium neutral atoms with optical clock qubits. First to surpass 1000 atoms. Microsoft partnership for logical qubit demos.
desc.zh: 使用光學鐘量子位元的鍶中性原子。首家突破 1000 原子的廠商。與 Microsoft 合作展示邏輯量子位元。

milestone.en: Orion Alpha 100q+ analog system (2024), merger with Qu&Co
milestone.zh: Orion Alpha 100q+ 類比系統 (2024)、與 Qu&Co 合併

desc.en: Neutral atom analog and digital quantum computing. Co-founded by Nobel laureate Alain Aspect. Pulser open-source SDK.
desc.zh: 中性原子類比與數位量子運算。諾貝爾獎得主 Alain Aspect 共同創辦。Pulser 開源 SDK。

milestone.en: Sqorpius cesium neutral atom system, Superstaq cross-platform compiler
milestone.zh: Sqorpius 銫中性原子系統、Superstaq 跨平台編譯器

desc.en: Formerly ColdQuanta. Neutral atom hardware + quantum software (Superstaq) + sensing (clocks, RF receivers).
desc.zh: 前身為 ColdQuanta。中性原子硬體 + 量子軟體 (Superstaq) + 感測 (時鐘、射頻接收器)。

milestone.en: Tunnel Falls 12-qubit silicon spin chip (2023), Horse Ridge II cryo-CMOS controller
milestone.zh: Tunnel Falls 12 量子位元矽自旋晶片 (2023)、Horse Ridge II 低溫 CMOS 控制器

desc.en: Silicon spin qubits leveraging 300mm CMOS fab. Quantum SDK and Horse Ridge cryogenic control chips.
desc.zh: 利用 300mm CMOS 廠房的矽自旋量子位元。Quantum SDK 與 Horse Ridge 低溫控制晶片。

milestone.en: 99%+ 2Q gate fidelity in silicon CMOS spin qubits (2024)
milestone.zh: 矽 CMOS 自旋量子位元 99%+ 雙量子位元閘保真度 (2024)

desc.en: UNSW spin-out commercializing silicon CMOS spin qubits. Targets millions of qubits via standard semiconductor manufacturing.
desc.zh: UNSW 衍生公司，商業化矽 CMOS 自旋量子位元。目標透過標準半導體製造達到百萬量子位元。

milestone.en: First full-stack silicon quantum chip on 300mm CMOS (2024)
milestone.zh: 首個 300mm CMOS 全堆疊矽量子晶片 (2024)

desc.en: Silicon spin qubits in standard CMOS, collaborating with foundries to scale.
desc.zh: 標準 CMOS 中的矽自旋量子位元，與晶圓廠合作擴展。

milestone.en: Majorana 1 topological chip (2025), Azure Quantum cloud, Q# language
milestone.zh: Majorana 1 拓樸晶片 (2025)、Azure Quantum 雲端、Q# 語言

desc.en: Topological qubits based on Majorana zero modes. Azure Quantum cloud aggregates hardware from IonQ, Quantinuum, Atom Computing, Rigetti.
desc.zh: 基於 Majorana zero modes 的拓樸量子位元。Azure Quantum 雲端整合 IonQ、Quantinuum、Atom Computing、Rigetti 的硬體。

milestone.en: OPX1000 control platform, NVIDIA DGX Quantum collaboration (2024)
milestone.zh: OPX1000 控制平台、NVIDIA DGX Quantum 合作 (2024)

desc.en: Platform-agnostic quantum control systems (OPX series) and QUA pulse-level language. Used by most superconducting/neutral-atom labs.
desc.zh: 平台無關的量子控制系統 (OPX 系列) 與 QUA pulse-level 語言。多數超導/中性原子實驗室在用。

milestone.en: SHFQC qubit controller, QCCS scalable control architecture
milestone.zh: SHFQC 量子位元控制器、QCCS 可擴展控制架構

desc.en: Precision quantum control electronics (AWGs, qubit controllers, lock-in amplifiers). LabOne software ecosystem.
desc.zh: 精密量子控制電子裝置 (AWG、量子位元控制器、鎖相放大器)。LabOne 軟體生態系。

milestone.en: Cluster modular control stack, Qblox-QM partnership integrations (2024)
milestone.zh: Cluster 模組化控制堆疊、Qblox-QM 合作整合 (2024)

desc.en: Modular qubit control stack spun out of QuTech (TU Delft). Targets scalable control electronics for 1000+ qubit systems.
desc.zh: 源自 QuTech (TU Delft) 的模組化量子位元控制堆疊。針對 1000+ 量子位元系統的可擴展控制電子裝置。

milestone.en: KIDE platform (large-form-factor dilution refrigerator, 2023), KF and XLDsl series
milestone.zh: KIDE 平台 (大尺寸稀釋冷凍機, 2023)、KF 與 XLDsl 系列

desc.en: Dominant supplier of dilution refrigerators (sub-10mK) used by IBM, Google, and most superconducting/spin qubit labs worldwide.
desc.zh: 稀釋冷凍機 (sub-10mK) 主要供應商，IBM、Google 及全球多數超導/自旋量子位元實驗室使用。

milestone.en: Classiq Studio high-level synthesis, Qmod modeling language
milestone.zh: Classiq Studio 高階綜合、Qmod 建模語言

desc.en: High-level quantum algorithm synthesis (analogous to RTL synthesis in classical EDA). Hardware-agnostic, targets all major backends.
desc.zh: 高階量子演算法綜合 (類比經典 EDA 的 RTL 綜合)。硬體無關，可針對所有主要後端。

milestone.en: Promethium quantum chemistry platform (2024)
milestone.zh: Promethium 量子化學平台 (2024)

desc.en: Enterprise quantum algorithms and chemistry simulation. Promethium GPU-accelerated chemistry platform with quantum-ready interface.
desc.zh: 企業級量子演算法與化學模擬。Promethium GPU 加速化學平台，具備量子就緒介面。

milestone.en: Fire Opal performance management, Boulder Opal control suite — error-suppression layer for IBM, IonQ, Rigetti, Quantinuum
milestone.zh: Fire Opal 效能管理、Boulder Opal 控制套件 — IBM、IonQ、Rigetti、Quantinuum 的錯誤抑制層

desc.en: Quantum infrastructure software that characterizes hardware and applies optimized control pulses to suppress errors. Hardware-agnostic — runs on top of every major gate-model platform. Spun out from Michael Biercuk's group at UNSW Sydney.
desc.zh: 量子基礎建設軟體 — 描繪硬體特性並施加最佳化控制脈衝以抑制錯誤。硬體無關，可在所有主要閘模型平台上運行。源自 UNSW Sydney Michael Biercuk 教授團隊的衍生公司。

milestone.en: Hosts IonQ, QuEra, Rigetti, IQM hardware; Braket SDK and hybrid jobs
milestone.zh: 托管 IonQ、QuEra、Rigetti、IQM 硬體；Braket SDK 與混合任務

desc.en: Managed quantum cloud service. Multiple hardware providers + simulators + hybrid classical-quantum jobs.
desc.zh: 託管量子雲端服務。多家硬體提供商 + 模擬器 + 混合古典-量子任務。

milestone.en: Advantage2 6,000+ qubit annealer (2025), gate-model roadmap announced
milestone.zh: Advantage2 6,000+ 量子位元退火機 (2025)、發表閘模型路線圖

desc.en: Pioneer in quantum annealing (not gate-model). NYSE: QBTS. Leap cloud service for optimization workloads. Now developing gate-model superconducting systems too.
desc.zh: 量子退火先驅（非閘模型）。NYSE: QBTS。Leap 雲端服務針對最佳化問題。目前也在開發閘模型超導系統。

milestone.en: Dirac-3 thin-film lithium niobate photonic system (2024)
milestone.zh: Dirac-3 薄膜鈮酸鋰光子系統 (2024)

desc.en: Room-temperature photonic quantum computing for optimization and AI. NASDAQ: QUBT.
desc.zh: 室溫光子量子運算，針對最佳化與 AI。NASDAQ: QUBT。

milestone.en: Wuyuan (72q, 2024), OriginQ Cloud platform
milestone.zh: 悟源 (72q, 2024)、本源量子雲平台

desc.en: China's leading superconducting quantum vendor. Full stack from chip to OriginQ Cloud, partnerships with Chinese HPC centers.
desc.zh: 中國領先的超導量子廠商。從晶片到本源量子雲的全堆疊，與中國 HPC 中心合作。
